scripts.clean: shx rm -rf out packages/*/lib packages/*/out packages/*/.tsbuildinfo packages/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/xsmp-vscode/*.vsix packages/xsmp-tas-mdk/*.vsix coverage .vitest
scripts.build:workspace: tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && npm run build:assets && npm run build -w xsmp-modeler
scripts.build: npm run langium:generate:production && npm run build:workspace
scripts.watch: concurrently -n tsc,vscode,tas-mdk -c blue,yellow,magenta "npm run watch:tsc" "npm run watch --workspace=xsmp-modeler" "npm run watch -w xsmp-tas-mdk"
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w xsmp && npm run lint -w @xsmp/tool-smp && npm run lint -w @xsmp/tool-adoc && npm run lint -w @xsmp/tool-python && npm run lint -w @xsmp/profile-xsmp-sdk && npm run lint -w @xsmp/profile-esa-cdk && npm run lint -w xsmp-tas-mdk && npm run lint -w @xsmp/cli && npm run lint -w xsmp-modeler
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:raw
scripts.coverage: npm run build && npm run coverage:raw
scripts.package:modeler: npm run build && npm run package -w xsmp-modeler -- --no-dependencies
scripts.package:tas-mdk: npm run build && npm run package -w xsmp-tas-mdk
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w xsmp-modeler -- --no-dependencies && npm run package -w xsmp-tas-mdk
scripts.publish: npm run build && npm run publish -w xsmp-modeler
